reviews.review_description: The game is good but so repetitive needs to be difficult and different robots to fight against Devs listen up you need to make levels easier to get and make more weapons skins for the weapons and for your character

developer_response.body:
Hi CRJ35! Thank you for the review. We listen to everything our players tell us, and I think you'll be happy to know that we are of the same mind on the difficulty and pacing! We are working on a content patch that we will release soon that is going to replace the current progression system and move it from a purely leveling up system to a flexible system where you will spend your scrap to unlock weapons, weapon modules, and gems in whatever order you want!  We also have multiple new weapons in various stages of development that we will be adding to the game. 

 Your review is on the cusp of our patch finishing rolling out to 100% of headsets, if you didn't play on the latest build the difficulty is increased significantly.  If you did play on the latest patch; What suggestions do you have to alter the difficulty?

We have more skins on the way. In the meantime - Did you find and interact with the free cosmetics terminal in the vault? There are a lot of skins for both your bot and your weapons that you spend the scrap you earn on. 

If you want to come chat with us or have other ideas feel free to join our Discord! https://discord.gg/QcuQkJd5jv

reviews.review_description: This game is awesome. Good graphics good guns grappling hooks, good movement, but there’s only one thing they should add that would make this game 100 times better and that’s full body. Just having your little hands moving around is kind of boring and the grappling looks a little bit junkie but other than that it seems crazy. They just need a little bit more and they gotta fix a few glitches here and there but great game and please add full body.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback! We are about to release a patch with lots of fixes and hosted servers! We have full body on the roadmap, but are currently focusing on content, bug fixes, and the hosted server backend. Our plan is to add it eventually but don't currently have an ETA on full body. I will say that all cosmetics and animations are animated on a full body though and we're currently hiding the lower body so when we do get around to finishing that feature, everything in the game will game the lower body elements.

reviews.review_title: I WISH PEOPLE WOULD PLAY THIS MORE OFTEN
reviews.review_description: :( PLLLLEASSSSEEE MORE PEOPLE NEED TO PLAY THISSSS

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We're glad you like it, we are nearing a new patch release that is going to implement hosted servers and the ability to join matches in progress, this should make it much easier to link up with players when they're online! We appreciate the support, review, and spreading the word!

reviews.review_title: Great game! Free, co-op, cool grappling
reviews.review_description: For an EA game, this game is very fleshed out and I have been really liking the fast paced scrap runners missions. This game is pretty challenging though at first, make sure you check out the tutorial and read the signs cause it gives you good tips on the movement and gem system. The grappling mechanics are really well done and don’t make me feel sick which is very impressive (have not seen this in a vr game yet so hats off). The art style is really cool and it is all on standalone on the Q3 (running super well for me too despite being pretty much off EA launch) so honestly try this game out it’s more than worth it. Trying to get all my buddies to grab it so we can try and speed run some of the missions. Also some really awesome outta pocket voicelines on the enemies, love it 10/10 (also they have another mobile game that’s free called Scrap Age survivors, and it’s like a more challenging version of vampire survivors I’ve been playing that at work and it goes hard too)
Great arcade game with cool graphics and the best part of it that it's free
Pretty fun game, it just needs to teach more than it does and it needs to tell us how we unlock each weapon but other than that this game is great.
I just got this today, and I must say, with little players there currently are, the quality is overwhelming for a free game!
